message:
fix(engine): correct CFG successor analysis for backward jumps and expand containment action coverage

execution_orchestrator.rs:
- Remove spurious `target > idx` guard from Jump and JumpIfFalse CFG
  successor computation — backward jumps are valid control flow and must
  be included in the successor set for dead-code and reachability analysis
- Narrow the "no-op containment" early return to Allow only — Challenge
  and Sandbox now emit a containment receipt (they have observable side
  effects) but still skip saga creation since they don't require follow-up
  orchestration
- Clarify step 10 comment about saga-requiring actions

Integration tests:
- phase_execute_containment_allow_remains_noop: verifies Allow produces
  no receipt and no saga
- phase_execute_containment_challenge_emits_receipt_without_saga: verifies
  Challenge creates a receipt but no saga
- phase_execute_containment_sandbox_emits_receipt_without_saga: verifies
  Sandbox creates a receipt but no saga

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
